goal: Analyze current potential investment opportunities across multiple asset classes and provide actionable insights

subtasks.prompt: Analyze current global macroeconomic indicators (GDP growth, inflation, employment, interest rates) and identify trends that could impact investment opportunities.
subtasks.title: Macroeconomic Environment Scan

subtasks.prompt: Evaluate the technology sector for investment opportunities, considering AI advancements, semiconductor demand, cloud computing, and cybersecurity. Identify specific areas with high growth potential.
subtasks.title: Technology Sector Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Assess the healthcare sector for investment opportunities, focusing on biotech innovations, aging populations, medical devices, and health services. Highlight promising sub-sectors.
subtasks.title: Healthcare Sector Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Examine the energy sector and commodities markets (oil, gas, renewables, metals) for investment opportunities given energy transition trends and geopolitical factors.
subtasks.title: Energy and Commodities Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Analyze real estate and infrastructure investment opportunities, considering interest rate sensitivity, urbanization trends, and infrastructure spending plans.
subtasks.title: Real Estate and Infrastructure Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Evaluate opportunities in fixed income markets, including government bonds, corporate debt, and high-yield bonds, considering yield curves and credit spreads.
subtasks.title: Fixed Income and Bond Market Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Identify current geopolitical risks (trade tensions, conflicts, elections) and their potential impact on global investment opportunities.
subtasks.title: Geopolitical Risk Assessment

subtasks.prompt: Analyze central bank policies (Fed, ECB, BoJ, PBoC) and their implications for interest rates, currency markets, and investment flows.
subtasks.title: Central Bank Policy and Monetary Trends

subtasks.prompt: Explore alternative investment opportunities such as private equity, venture capital, hedge funds, and cryptocurrencies, highlighting areas with high return potential.
subtasks.title: Alternative Investments Scan

subtasks.prompt: Investigate ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) investment trends and identify opportunities in sustainable energy, green bonds, and socially responsible companies.
subtasks.title: ESG and Sustainable Investing Trends

success_criteria: Identify at least 3 sectors or asset classes with strong growth potential
Evaluate key risks for each identified opportunity
Provide clear, data-driven rationale for each opportunity
Cover a diverse range including equities, fixed income, and alternative assets

verification_steps.prompt: Critically examine the findings from all analysts. Identify any inconsistencies, overly optimistic assumptions, missing risk factors, or conflicting signals across different sectors and macro trends. Challenge the validity of the identified opportunities.
